title: 0pnMatrx Component Registry
description: Schema for the component registry manifest used by 0pnMatrx gateway and MTRX iOS app

id.description: Unique component identifier matching the service dispatcher key

description.description: One-line description of what the component does

category.description: Component category for grouping in the UI

min_tier.description: Minimum subscription tier required to access this component

limits.description: Per-tier usage limits. Keys are tier names, values are limit objects.

gateway_actions.description: List of platform_action names this component handles

icon.description: SF Symbols icon name for the MTRX iOS app

available.description: Whether this component is currently operational
